notes: Solid Pong implementation with working AI, two-player mode, custom digit rendering, ball trail, and sound effects; minor issue is the attract-mode ball doesn't properly initialize speed on first load (speed=0 check is a workaround), and the STATE_SCORED still moves paddles/resets oddly, but overall very playable.
Beautiful presentation and perfect 2-player mode, but the default 1-player mode contains a fatal infinite loop in the AI prediction logic that freezes the browser the moment the AI hits the ball.
A solid and mostly complete Pong with working scoring, AI, states, and collisions, but title/menu control flow and some serve/reset behavior are a bit rough rather than polished.
